_comment: CPAGrip offer template — copy this block per offer.
_instructions: 1. Sign up at cpagrip.com as a publisher
2. Go to Offer Tools → Offer Links and find your offers
3. For each offer, copy the offer URL and replace YOUR_USER_ID and OFFER_ID below
4. Set your postback URL in CPAGrip dashboard to:
(CPAGrip uses {subid1} for your custom tracking parameter)
5. The click_id you send as subid1 will come back in {subid1} in the postback
6. Run: npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/import-offers.ts --file offers/cpagrip.json
name: CPAGrip Offer Name Here
title: Display Title Shown to Users
description: Short description of what the user needs to do.
